title: Elite Collection Crystal Tumbler Glasses 350ML - Lead-Free, Cut Transparent Design - Elegant Drinkware for Home, Restaurants & Kitchen - Perfect Drinking Gift Set of 6 in Gift Box
features: Premium Lead Free Crystal Glasses: - Made from High Quality, Lead Free Crystal, these 350ML drinking glasses offer unparalleled clarity and shine, perfect for enjoying whisky, cocktails, juices or water in style.

Elegant Diamond-Cut Design: Featuring a unique diamond-cut design, these glasses add a touch of sophistication to any setting. Their ultra-clear finish makes them ideal for home, restaurants, bars, and kitchens.
Perfect Gift Set in Multiple Options: Available in sets of 2, 3, 4, or 6, these crystal tumblers come in an elegant gift box, making them the perfect gift for Dad, housewarming parties, or Christmas.

Versatile and Dishwasher Safe: These glasses are not only visually stunning but also practical. Dishwasher safe for easy cleaning, they’re perfect for everyday use, whether for water, juice, or your favourite cocktail.
